title: DoodleDesk Activity Event Schema v1
description: Schema for raw activity events exported from DoodleDesk for Azure Blob ingestion and Azure Data Factory processing.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for the activity event.

user_id.description: Stable identifier for the DoodleDesk user.

desk_id.description: Identifier for the desk where the event occurred.

event_type.description: Type of activity captured by the event.

event_ts_utc.description: UTC timestamp when the event occurred.

session_id.description: Identifier for the user session associated with the event.

note_id.description: Optional note identifier for note-level activity.

edit_count.description: Number of edits recorded during the event window, when applicable.

collaboration_count.description: Count of collaboration actions associated with the event, when applicable.

session_seconds.description: Duration in seconds for the active session segment, when applicable.

device_type.description: Optional device type used during the event, such as desktop or mobile.

platform.description: Optional platform or browser context for the event.

metadata_json.description: Optional free-form metadata for downstream enrichment.
